title: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates
detailed_summary: Infosys Science Foundation announced the Infosys Prize 2025 laureates across six research categories. The prize recognizes early-career researchers and includes a gold medal, citation, and prize purse of USD 100,000 or equivalent in INR for each category. The announcement is primarily philanthropic and awards-related, with no disclosed material business, financial, strategic, or governance impact for Infosys Limited.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Science Foundation announced the winners of the Infosys Prize 2025 in six categories: Economics, Engineering and Computer Science, Humanities and Social Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematical Sciences, and Physical Sciences.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates

key_facts.fact: The prize for each category comprises a gold medal, a citation, and a prize purse of USD 100,000 (or its equivalent in INR).
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates

key_facts.fact: From 2024, the prize has shifted focus to honor researchers under the age of 40.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates
